message:
fix: wrap tool lists at terminal width and always show status sections

Tool lists in /status now wrap at the terminal width instead of
scrolling off-screen. All sections (Tools, MCP Servers, Skills,
Plugins, Hooks, Subagents, Agents) are always shown with their
counts, even when empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
